title: pubrun Manifest
description: Schema for a pubrun execution manifest.

meta_ref.description: Optional path to a parent meta.json snapshot for HPC parent-child manifest hydration.

extensions.description: Optional namespaced extension sections contributed by plugins.

data_files.description: Custom tracked input datasets and output files.

utc_datetime.description: POSIX epoch float (time.time()). Stored as floats for sub-second precision, timezone-agnostic storage, trivial arithmetic, and deterministic serialization.

required_by.description: In imported-transitive mode, the imported packages that require this (transitive) dependency.

floating_point_precision.description: Information about floating point capabilities (e.g. FP32, FP64, TF32).

notices.description: Non-disruptive config notices recorded at run time (e.g. a deprecated, inert core.profile). Never raised into the host; surfaced by pubrun status/inspect/show.

timestamp_utc.description: POSIX epoch timestamp when the signal was received.

signals_received.description: List of OS signals received during execution.

exit_code.description: Process exit code captured at finalization. Null if unknown.

exit_exception.description: String representation of the exit-causing exception, if any.
